name: Confetti Rice (Marks)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Brown basmati rice, soaked 2 hours
2 cups Chicken broth or Vegetable stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size non-stick saucepan, heat the oil.
2. Heat and sauté onion until softened.
3. Rinse and drain the rice.
4. Add to the saucepan and brown.
5. Add wine, thyme, pepper, and broth; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
7. Add peas and bell pepper; cook, stirring occasionally, until all liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
8. Garnish with cheese and serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 192; CHO: 34g; PRO: 5g; SOD: 59mg; FAT: 3g
